component.name: CLAI
component.summary: Desktop multi-agent orchestration app with MCP-native tools

description.p: CLAI is a desktop application for orchestrating and monitoring AI agents with MCP-native tool integration. It provides a unified interface for managing multiple AI providers, scheduled automations, local execution with shell access controls, and workspace orchestration with canvas and dashboards.
Features include tabbed capability scopes, per-agent filesystem and shell policies, run notices for policy denials, and support for any OpenAI-compatible provider.

screenshot.caption: Main workspace with agent chat and orchestration tools

description.p: Agent memory system, web search/fetch tools, run boundary markers, and Fleet chat input.
